# jamfprotect_action_config (Resource)

Manages an action configuration in Jamf Protect. Action configurations define the alert data enrichment settings and reporting clients for a plan.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jamfprotect_action_config" "default" {
  name        = "Default Action Config"
  description = "Default alert data enrichment settings."

  alert_config = {
    data = {
      binary                = { attrs = ["signingInfo", "isAppBundle"], related = ["process"] }
      click_event           = { attrs = [], related = [] }
      download_event        = { attrs = ["sourceUrl"], related = ["file", "process"] }
      file                  = { attrs = ["sha256hex", "path"], related = [] }
      fs_event              = { attrs = ["path"], related = ["process", "file"] }
      group                 = { attrs = [], related = [] }
      proc_event            = { attrs = ["ppid", "uid"], related = ["process"] }
      process               = { attrs = ["name", "path", "pid"], related = ["binary", "user"] }
      screenshot_event      = { attrs = [], related = [] }
      usb_event             = { attrs = [], related = [] }
      user                  = { attrs = ["name", "uid"], related = [] }
      gk_event              = { attrs = [], related = [] }
      keylog_register_event = { attrs = [], related = [] }
      mrt_event             = { attrs = [], related = [] }
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alert_config` (Attributes) Alert configuration defining which data attributes and related objects to include in alerts for each event type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config))
- `name` (String) The name of the action configuration.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the action configuration.
- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `hash` (String) The configuration hash.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the action configuration.
- `updated` (String) The last-updated timestamp.

<a id="nestedatt--alert_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_config`

Required:

- `data` (Attributes) Data enrichment settings per event type. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data))

<a id="nestedatt--alert_config--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_config.data`

Required:

- `binary` (Attributes) Binary/executable metadata enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--binary))
- `click_event` (Attributes) Click event enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--click_event))
- `download_event` (Attributes) Download event enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--download_event))
- `file` (Attributes) File metadata enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--file))
- `fs_event` (Attributes) File system event enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--fs_event))
- `gk_event` (Attributes) Gatekeeper event enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--gk_event))
- `group` (Attributes) Group metadata enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--group))
- `keylog_register_event` (Attributes) Keylogger registration event enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--keylog_register_event))
- `mrt_event` (Attributes) Malware Removal Tool event enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--mrt_event))
- `proc_event` (Attributes) Process event enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--proc_event))
- `process` (Attributes) Process metadata enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--process))
- `screenshot_event` (Attributes) Screenshot event enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--screenshot_event))
- `usb_event` (Attributes) USB device event enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--usb_event))
- `user` (Attributes) User metadata enrichment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_config--data--user))

<a id="nestedatt--alert_config--data--binary"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_config.data.binary`

Required:

- `attrs` (List of String) Attribute names to include in alert data for this event type.
- `related` (List of String) Related object types to include in alert data (e.g. `file`, `process`, `user`).

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).
- `delete` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours). Setting a timeout for a Delete operation is only applicable if changes are saved into state before the destroy operation occurs.
- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours). Read operations occur during any refresh or planning operation when refresh is enabled.
- `update` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import jamfprotect_action_config.default "<action-config-id>"
```
